OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Comissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff S.F. Copr, is present. Represented by Simone Torendale
Attorney, Kevin Eikenberry, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Kurt Kaywood, is present.
Defendant is in pro per.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-15-2010 is vacated.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF SF CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO HIS STATUS AS A TENANT THROUGH HIS DECLARATION.
